zh.Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾
zh.Stamford, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾斯坦福
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Bird於1382年出生在英國爾咸頓時，他的父親Sir Hugh le Bird Knight of Nantwich Cheshire25歲，母親Dorothy Ann De Weavers19歲。他於1405年與Katherine Alice Malpas在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1437年在英國英格蘭爾享年55歲。

zh-hans.Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾
zh-hans.Stamford, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾斯坦福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Bird于1382年出生在英国爾咸頓时，他的父亲Sir Hugh le Bird Knight of Nantwich Cheshire25岁，母亲Dorothy Ann De Weavers19岁。他于1405年与Katherine Alice Malpas在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1437年在英国英格兰爾享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bird
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: nickname for a young or a small and slender person, from Middle English brid, bird, burd (Old English bird, brid, perhaps also byrd) ‘bird, young bird’, also ‘young man, young woman, child’.

Irish: Anglicized form of a number of Irish names erroneously thought to contain the element éan ‘bird’, in particular Ó hÉinigh (see Heagney ), Ó hÉanna (see Heaney ), Ó hÉanacháin (see Heneghan ), and Mac an Déaghanaigh (see McEneaney ).

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘bird’, as for example German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) Vogel , French Loiseau , Czech Ptáček (see Ptacek ) and Pták, Polish Ptak .

variants.name: Kingbird
meanings: Native American (Chippewa; also King Bird): translation into English of the Chippewa personal name Ogimaa-bines(i), meaning literally ‘the bird that is king’ and referring to the mythological bird-like creature thunderbird. See also Bird 4.
History: The progenitor of the large family of the Kingbirds from the Red Lake, MN, was Ogimaa-bines, a musical gifted Chippewa spiritual leader.

variants.name: Byrd
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Bird  .

variants.name: Heaney
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aidan, Malachy, Nuala, Ronan.

Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hÉanna and Ó hÉinne, ‘descendant of Éanna’, a very common personal name of uncertain meaning. It was borne by various early Christian saints, most notably Saint Éanna of Aran. The name has been erroneously understood as containing the element éan ‘bird’ and as a result the surname was sometimes Anglicized as Bird .

variants.name: Blackbird
meanings: Native American (also Black Bird): translation into English of a personal name such as Lakota Sioux Ziŋtkala Sapa, which is composed of ziŋtkala ‘bird’ and sapa ‘black’. See also Bird 4.
English (Durham): nickname for someone with a dark beard, from Middle English blak ‘black’ + berd ‘beard’ (Old English blæc + beard).

variants.name: Burd
meanings: Jewish (from Poland and Ukraine): nickname for a man with a notable beard, from a southern Yiddish pronunciation of Yiddish bord ‘beard’.

variants.name: Burt
meanings: English (southern): variant of   Bird  ,   Bright  , or   Burd  .
German: Middle High German burt ‘that which is due or proper’, therefore a nickname for someone who has fulfilled his obligations properly.
Jewish (from Poland and Ukraine): variant of   Burd  .

variants.name: Hummingbird
meanings: Native American (Cherokee): translation into English of a personal name based on the Cherokee name walela for a hummingbird. See also Bird 4.

variants.name: Heagney
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hÉignigh, ‘descendant of Éigneach’, a personal name meaning ‘forceful’. The spelling of the Irish name was often simplified to Ó hÉinigh and then Anglicized as Heaney or ‘translated’ as Bird , the latter because of a perceived similarity to éan ‘bird’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Bird was born in 1382, in Hampton, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir Hugh le Bird Knight of Nantwich Cheshire, was 25 and his mother, Dorothy Ann De Weavers, was 19. He married Katherine Alice Malpas in 1405, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1437, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Bird est né en 1382, à Hampton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Hugh le Bird Knight of Nantwich Cheshire, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Dorothy Ann De Weavers, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Alice Malpas en 1405, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1437, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Bird 1382 in Hampton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Hugh le Bird Knight of Nantwich Cheshire 25 und seine Mutter Dorothy Ann De Weavers 19. Er hat 1405 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Katherine Alice Malpas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1437 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Bird è nato il nel 1382 nel Hampton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Hugh le Bird Knight of Nantwich Cheshire, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Dorothy Ann De Weavers, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Alice Malpas nel 1405, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1437, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Birdが1382年にイギリスチェシュアイアハンプトンで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh le Bird Knight of Nantwich Cheshireは25歳，母Dorothy Ann De Weaversは19歳であった。1405年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでKatherine Alice Malpasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1437年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Bird(이)가 1382년 영국 체실르 함프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Hugh le Bird Knight of Nantwich Cheshire(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Dorothy Ann De Weavers(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1405년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Katherine Alice Malpas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1437년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Bird nasceu em 1382, em Hampton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Hugh le Bird Knight of Nantwich Cheshire, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Dorothy Ann De Weavers, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Alice Malpas em 1405, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1437, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Bird родился в 1382 г. в местности хамптон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Hugh le Bird Knight of Nantwich Cheshire было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Dorothy Ann De Weavers, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Alice Malpas в 1405 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1437 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Bird nació en 1382, en Hampton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Hugh le Bird Knight of Nantwich Cheshire, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Dorothy Ann De Weavers, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Katherine Alice Malpas en 1405, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1437, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años.
